lines.speaker: Sigbert the Adventurer
lines.text: I'd be very careful going down there friend.

lines.speaker: Sigbert the Adventurer
lines.text: Salarin the twisted. One of Kandarin's most dangerous chaos druids. I tried to take him on, then suddenly felt immensely weak.

lines.speaker: Sigbert the Adventurer
lines.text: I hear he's susceptible to attacks from the mind. However I have no idea what that means, so it's not much help to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fear not, I am very strong

lines.speaker: Sigbert the Adventurer
lines.text: You might find you are not so strong shortly...
